content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be redefined as a recursive agent-of-agents, where the memory architecture itself acts as an independent meta-agent that selectively curates which experiences the base active learning agent queries next, rather than being a passive storage layer. This meta-agent memory dynamically prunes redundant stored knowledge and prioritizes uncertain, high-information traces based on its own curiosity-driven reward signal.
